question: Based on the chart data values, between which two labeled years did GDP increase by the larger amount?

options.C: Both intervals have about the same GDP increase
options.D: The GDP changes are too irregular to compare these intervals

explanation: The chart uses a non-linear (inappropriate) y-axis scaling function, so equal vertical distances do not correspond to equal changes in the underlying values. That can make one period look like it changed more even when the data show otherwise. 2001-2003: 80 → 247 (change 167); 2004-2007: 3677 → 3342 (change 335).
